# Exacli

> A CLI tool for the Exa AI search API. Search the web semantically, extract content from URLs, get AI-powered answers with citations, and conduct automated research from your terminal.

## Overview

Exacli is a command-line interface for the Exa AI search API. Written in Go with zero runtime dependencies. It provides commands for semantic web search, content extraction, AI-powered Q&A, and automated research tasks. Outputs formatted markdown by default with JSON and TOON format support for scripting.

## Installation

```bash
# Build from source (requires Go 1.21+ and Task)
git clone https://github.com/SoftwareStartups/exacli.git
cd exacli
go mod download
task build
sudo cp build/exacli /usr/local/bin/
```

## Configuration

```bash
# Store API key in OS keychain
exacli login

# Or set as environment variable
export EXA_API_KEY="your-api-key-here"

# Or pass per command
exacli search "query" --api-key "your-key"
```

API key resolution order: `--api-key` flag → `EXA_API_KEY` env var → OS keychain

Get your API key at: https://dashboard.exa.ai/api-keys

## Quick Start

```bash
# Search the web
exacli search "latest AI developments"

# Search with content extraction
exacli search "machine learning papers" --text --num-results 5

# Get AI-powered answers
exacli answer "What is quantum computing?"

# Find similar pages
exacli similar "https://example.com/article"

# Conduct automated research
exacli research "Latest SpaceX valuation" --poll
```

## Core Commands

### Search
Search the web using semantic search.

```bash
exacli search "query" [options]
```

**Options:**
- `--num-results <n>`: Number of results (default: 10)
- `--type <auto|fast|deep|instant>`: Search type
- `--text`: Include full text content
- `--highlights`: Include relevant highlights
- `--summary`: Include AI-generated summary
- `--category <category>`: Filter by category
- `--include-domains <list>`: Comma-separated domains to include
- `--exclude-domains <list>`: Comma-separated domains to exclude
- `--start-date <date>`: Start date (ISO format)
- `--end-date <date>`: End date (ISO format)
- `--autoprompt`: Use autoprompt to enhance query

**Categories:** company, research paper, news, pdf, tweet, personal site, financial report, people

### Contents
Retrieve contents from specific URLs.

```bash
exacli contents <url...> [options]
```

**Options:**
- `--text`: Include full text
- `--highlights`: Include highlights
- `--summary`: Include summary
- `--max-age-hours <n>`: Maximum age of cached content

### Similar
Find pages similar to a given URL.

```bash
exacli similar <url> [options]
```

**Options:**
- `--num-results <n>`: Number of results
- `--exclude-source-domain`: Exclude same domain
- `--text`, `--highlights`, `--summary`: Content options
- `--category <category>`: Filter by category

### Answer
Get AI-powered answers with citations.

```bash
exacli answer "query" [options]
```

**Options:**
- `--text`: Include source text in citations
- `--model <exa|exa-pro>`: Model to use (default: exa)
- `--stream`: Stream response in real-time
- `--system-prompt <text>`: Custom system prompt

### Research
Create automated research tasks.

```bash
exacli research "instructions" [options]
```

**Options:**
- `--model <fast|regular|pro>`: Research model
- `--poll`: Poll until completion
- `--poll-interval <ms>`: Polling interval (default: 1000)
- `--timeout <ms>`: Timeout (default: 600000)

### Research Status
Check research task status.

```bash
exacli research-status <task-id>
```

### Research List
List all research tasks.

```bash
exacli research-list [options]
```

**Options:**
- `--limit <n>`: Number of tasks
- `--cursor <token>`: Pagination cursor

### Auth
```bash
exacli login   # Store API key in OS keychain
exacli logout  # Remove API key from OS keychain
```

## Global Options

- `--api-key <key>`: Exa API key
- `--json`: Output raw JSON instead of markdown
- `--toon`: Output compact TOON format
- `-h, --help`: Show help

## Examples

### Semantic Search
```bash
exacli search "hottest AI startups 2024"
exacli search "transformer architecture" --type deep --text --highlights
exacli search "AI acquisitions" --category news --start-date 2024-01-01
exacli search "research" --include-domains "arxiv.org,openai.com"
```

### Content Extraction
```bash
exacli contents "https://arxiv.org/abs/2304.15004" --text
exacli contents "https://example.com/1" "https://example.com/2" --highlights --summary
```

### AI Q&A
```bash
exacli answer "What is neural machine translation?"
exacli answer "Explain large language models" --stream
exacli answer "Explain recursion" --system-prompt "Explain like I'm 5"
```

### Research Workflow
```bash
exacli research "SpaceX valuation and funding history" --poll
exacli research-status "task-id"
exacli research-list --limit 10
```

## Development

```bash
go mod download  # Download dependencies
task build       # Build binary to build/exacli
task lint        # go vet ./...
task test        # Run tests
task check       # Lint + tests
task ci          # Full CI pipeline
task compile     # Optimized binary -> dist/exacli
```

- [README](https://github.com/SoftwareStartups/exacli#readme): Full documentation
- [Exa API Docs](https://exa.ai/docs): Official Exa API documentation
- [Issues](https://github.com/SoftwareStartups/exacli/issues): Report bugs or request features
